why_level_3.runtime_plan_generation: DynamicPlanner analyzes the user query, detects intent, estimates complexity, and generates workflow nodes at runtime from agent_registry.json.
why_level_3.runtime_adjustment: QualityGate can insert review or retry nodes after observing intermediate outputs, including small-target review and query-rewrite retry.
why_level_3.error_recovery: RecoveryManager switches failed agents to registered fallback agents, such as MedSAM failure to ground-truth overlay and invalid case access to case metadata recovery.
why_level_3.auditability: Every generated plan, node trace, quality decision, retry, fallback decision, elapsed time, input keys, output and final report are saved as JSON evidence.

why_level_2.optimized_beyond_basic: Offline local-HTML ingestion extracts text, image references, and tables into one searchable index with modality-aware scoring.
why_level_2.edge_cases: Empty queries, no-hit retrieval, modality filtering, missing local evidence, and deterministic ranking are covered.
why_level_2.deeper_analysis: The evaluation reports modality counts (75/277/277 after restoring the full local NPC dataset), evidence modalities per query, and a 20-question result set.

rubric_alignment: Advanced dynamic orchestration Lv.3 plus multi-modal knowledge base Lv.2 gives total difficulty 5, satisfying the required total difficulty of at least 4.
